category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an interactive viewer for graphs written in Graphviz's dot language; official README confirms this purpose
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README identify the project as xdot.py; source_facts.name provides the executable/package name xdot
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides features, requirements, command-line usage, and embedding notes
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project and source_facts.repo is empty
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify an interactive Graphviz dot viewer implemented for Python/GTK/Cairo
